usernames.title: Usernames
usernames.description: List of Instagram usernames to scrape.

postUrls.title: Specific Post URLs
postUrls.description: List of specific Instagram post URLs to scrape (precise extraction).

newerThan.title: Newer Than (Date)
newerThan.description: Only scrape posts published AFTER this date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO).

olderThan.title: Older Than (Date)
olderThan.description: Only scrape posts published BEFORE this date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO).

limit.title: Limit Items
limit.description: Maximum number of items to scrape per username.

offset.title: Offset Items
offset.description: Number of items to skip from the start (pagination support).

sortDirection.title: Sort Direction
sortDirection.description: Internal result sorting before returning the dataset.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to be used by your crawler.
